{{ render_field(form.contact_person) }} {{ render_field(form.phone) }}
{{ render_field(form.tin) }} {{ render_field(form.email) }}
{{ render_field(form.payment_terms) }} {{ render_field(form.default_vat) }} {{ render_field(form.default_wt) }}
{{ render_field(form.address) }}
